name: Grilled Haole-Style Yams with Pineapple Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap the yams in foil and place on grill over medium-hot coals.
2. Cook for 45 to 60 minutes, or until tender when pinched.
3. In a saucepan, combine remaining ingredients. Heat, stirring, until margarine melts.
4. To serve, remove foil from yams, slit open, and spoon pineapple mixture into yams.
